    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    N

    NAME_LABEL - Static variable in class gui.board.Theme
     
    Nautilus - Class in nongui.listofcards.herocard.Tank
    Represents the "Nautilus" Hero Card.
    Nautilus() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.herocard.Tank.Nautilus
    Constructs Nautilus with his base stats and deep-sea flavor text.
    NeedlesslyLargeRod - Class in nongui.listofcards.itemcard.ChangeClass
    Represents the "Needlessly Large Rod" Item Card.
    NeedlesslyLargeRod() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.ChangeClass.NeedlesslyLargeRod
    Constructs a new Needlessly Large Rod with its identity, effect text, and target class.
    Neeko - Class in nongui.listofcards.herocard.Support
    Represents the "Neeko" Hero Card.
    Neeko() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.herocard.Support.Neeko
     
    nextTurn() - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameEngine
    Advances the game to the next player's turn.
